title: Goroutine Pools, Context Causes, Backpressure, and Shutdown · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded leak-free Go crawl pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.
Assign channel creation, senders, receiver, closer, buffering rationale, and cancellation behavior without double close or blocked send.
Derive owner, run, item, attempt, deadline, and shutdown contexts and preserve the first meaningful cancellation cause.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Budget Chain
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 5885 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove multiresource backpressure, channel ownership, context causes, error aggregation, and graceful join; every body, file, timer, transport, goroutine, channel, collector, and browser-service request needs one owner; then change one fuzz, race, mutation, capacity, binary, deployment, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.

Inspect the Work Budget Chain trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Graceful Join
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: crawler-go-graceful-join-1qf6lx" that uses case 9891 to prove multiresource backpressure, channel ownership, context causes, error aggregation, and graceful join. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, import x/net/html, goquery, Colly, or robotstxt, access host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim native parser, race, load, accessibility, privacy, legal, container, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, x/net 0.57.0, goquery 1.12.0, Colly 2.3.0, robotstxt 1.1.2, original fixtures, custom RoundTrippers, httptest servers, controlled DNS and browser-service environments, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected binaries and containers, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, legal review, and release gates.
